title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean, discusses his approach to building two unicorns over 12 years. He emphasizes focus and differentiation rather than scale or funding as the key to success, advocating for building less but winning more.
